text:
The Sports Day is a school competition between human students of Attack Junior High School. It is commented by Newspaper Club member Ilse Langnar.

Prelude

The games

Bread eating race

Ball toss

Shoulder wars

Aftermath

The first years group has lost to their upperclassmates and has to clean the court full of confetti. Rico, Petra, Oruo, Gunther and Eld offer to help them out, stating that they had challenged and lost to their upperclassmates as well before. 

As a way to have all the members of the Attack Junior High Scout Regiment do something together, the first years areinvited by older members to do a test of courage in the school at night.
